title: Philip II of Spain becomes King of Portugal
fact: Philip II, sometimes known in Spain as Philip the Prudent, was King of Spain from 1556, King of Portugal from 1580, and King of Naples and Sicily from 1554 until his death in 1598.

title: Philip IV of Spain becomes King of Portugal
fact: Philip IV, also called the Planet King, was King of Spain from 1621 to his death and King of Portugal from 1621 to 1640.

title: Philip III of Spain becomes King of Portugal
fact: Philip III was King of Spain and Portugal during the period known as the Iberian Union, reigning from 1598 until his death in 1621.

title: Pedro I of Brazil becomes King of Portugal
fact: Dom Pedro I, known in Brazil and in Portugal as "the Liberator" or "the Soldier King" in Portugal, was the founder and first ruler of the Empire of Brazil from 1822 to 1831 and King of Portugal in 1826.

title: Manuel II of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Dom Manuel II, sometimes known as the Unfortunate or the Patriot, was the last king of Portugal, reigning from 1908 until 1910.

title: Manuel I of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Manuel I, known as the Fortunate, was King of Portugal from 1495 to 1521.

title: John I of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: John I, also called John of Aviz, was King of Portugal from 1385 until his death in 1433.

title: John VI of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Dom John VI, known as "the Clement", was King of the United Kingdom of Portugal, Brazil and the Algarves from 1816 to 1825, and after the recognition of Brazil's independence, titular Emperor of Brazil and King of Portugal until his death in 1826.

title: Maria I of Portugal becomes Queen of Portugal
fact: Dona Maria I, also known as Maria the Pious in Portugal and Maria the Mad in Brazil, was Queen of Portugal from 24 February 1777 until her death in 1816.

title: Carlos I of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Dom Carlos I, known as "the Diplomat", "the Oceanographer" among many other names, was King of Portugal from 1889 until his assassination in 1908.

title: Maria II of Portugal becomes Queen of Portugal
fact: Dona Maria II also known as "the Educator" or as "the Good Mother", was Queen of Portugal from 1826 to 1828, and again from 1834 to 1853.

title: Peter I of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Peter I, known as Peter the Justicier, was King of Portugal from 1357 until his death in 1367.

title: Afonso I of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Dom Afonso I nicknamed "the Conqueror", "the Founder" and "the Great" by the Portuguese, was the first king of Portugal, from 26 July 1139 until his death on 6 December 1185.

title: Miguel I of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Dom Miguel I, known by several nicknames, was King of Portugal from 1828 to 1834.

title: John IV of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Dom John IV, also known by the Portuguese as John the Restorer, was the King of Portugal from 1640 until his death in 1656.

title: John II of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: John II, called the Perfect Prince, was King of Portugal from 1481 until his death in 1495, and also for a brief time in 1477.

title: John V of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Dom John V, known as the Magnanimous and the Portuguese Sun King, was King of Portugal from 9 December 1706 until his death in 1750.

title: José I of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Dom Joseph I, known as the Reformer, was King of Portugal from 31 July 1750 until his death in 1777.

title: John III of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: John III, nicknamed The Pious, was the King of Portugal and the Algarve from 1521 until he died in 1557.

title: Luís I of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Dom Luís I, known as "the Popular" was King of Portugal from 1861 to 1889.

title: Edward I of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Edward, also called Edward the Philosopher King or the Eloquent, was the King of Portugal from 1433 until his death.

title: Afonso V of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Afonso V, also known as the African, was King of Portugal from 1438 until he died in 1481, with a brief interruption in 1477.

title: Henry I of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Henry, dubbed the Chaste and the Cardinal-King, was King of Portugal and an inquisitor and cardinal of the Catholic Church, who ruled Portugal between 1578 and 1580.

title: Peter II of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Dom Pedro II, nicknamed the Pacific was King of Portugal from 1683 until his death, previously serving as regent for his brother Afonso VI from 1668 until his own accession.

title: Sebastian of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Sebastian was King of Portugal from 11 June 1557 to 4 August 1578 and the penultimate Portuguese monarch of the House of Aviz.

title: Pedro V of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Dom Pedro V, nicknamed "the Hopeful", was King of Portugal from 1853 until his death in 1861.

title: Ferdinand I of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Ferdinand I, sometimes called the Handsome or occasionally the Inconstant, was the King of Portugal from 1367 until his death in 1383.

title: Afonso III of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Afonso III, called the Boulonnais, was King of Portugal and the first to use the title King of Portugal and the Algarve, from 1249.

title: Denis I of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Denis, called the Farmer King and the Poet King, was King of Portugal from 1279 until his death in 1325.

title: António, Prior of Crato becomes King of Portugal
fact: António, Prior of Crato, sometimes called "The Determined", "The Fighter", "The Independentist" or "The Resistant", was a grandson of King Manuel I of Portugal who claimed the Portuguese throne during the 1580 dynastic crisis.

title: Afonso IV of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Afonso IV, called the Brave, was King of Portugal from 1325 until his death in 1357.

title: Afonso VI of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Dom Afonso VI, known as "the Victorious", was the second king of Portugal of the House of Braganza from 1656 until his death.

title: Sancho I of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Sancho I also referred to as Sancho the Populator, was King of Portugal from 1185 until his death in 1211.

title: Afonso II of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Afonso II, also called Afonso the Fat and Afonso the Leper, was King of Portugal from 1211 until 1223.

title: Sancho II of Portugal becomes King of Portugal
fact: Sancho II, nicknamed Sancho the Cowled or Sancho the Capuched, alternatively, Sancho the Pious, was King of Portugal from 1223 to 1248.
